form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 1.75 lengths in 24.88, beating Rise Up Nismo. Last start finished 4th on March 21 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Take A Break beaten 4 lengths (29.94) in a Grade 5. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 1.75 lengths in 24.88, beating Rise Up Nismo. Last start finished 4th on March 21 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Take A Break beaten 4 lengths (29.94) in a Grade 5. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and was slow to begin.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance to score by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 3/4 last start at this track, recording a brilliant 24.91 over the 450m journey. In form and looks tough to beat again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Eye-catching performance to score by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 3/4 last start at this track, recording a brilliant 24.91 over the 450m journey. In form and looks tough to beat again.

form.formComment: Strong performance to post a big 4 lengths win at this track over 400m (22.33) beating Super Storm in Grade 5 on March 30. Others preferred on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to post a big 4 lengths win at this track over 400m (22.33) beating Super Storm in Grade 5 on March 30. Others preferred on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted wide rounding the turn into the front straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by a nose at this track over 400m (22.57) beating King Mouse in Grade 5 on March 23. Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by a nose at this track over 400m (22.57) beating King Mouse in Grade 5 on March 23. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.75 lengths over 324m at Richmond Straight in a handy (17.36), beating Magic Mania. Among the chances and worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 1.75 lengths over 324m at Richmond Straight in a handy (17.36), beating Magic Mania. Among the chances and worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened and checked approaching the turn into the front straight.

form.formComment: Made considerable ground after settling back on debut. Won by 2.5 lengths at this track (22.24) beating Zipper Stride in a Maiden on March 30. Will find this much tougher but he's got good box manners and speed. Looks to be back in fine fettle. Makes plenty of appeal.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 400m at this track. That followed a win two back in 22.59 beating Camaro Rose over 400m at this track. Not keen this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (25.75) when fourth over 450m at this track in a Grade 5. Has never missed the frame from four starts from the draw, including a win. Tough line-up and may struggle.

form.formComment: Showed strong early pace and stuck on well despite finishing out of the placings when fifth over 450m this track in 25.34. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 4.5 lengths sixth (22.58) at Gosford. Previous form sound including a win three back at Gosford. Looks a strong place chance on best figures.
